nodes.label: Audio In (L/R)
nodes.description: Stereo audio input

nodes.label: Impulse Response
nodes.description: Audio file loaded via AudioSampleProcessor interface

nodes.label: Resample IR
nodes.description: Resamples the IR to match the host sample rate using Lagrange interpolation

nodes.label: Apply Damping
nodes.description: Applies an exponential fadeout to the IR based on the Damping parameter

nodes.label: Apply HiCut
nodes.description: Applies two cascaded one-pole low-pass filters with exponentially decreasing cutoff frequency along the IR

nodes.label: Damping
nodes.description: Damping amount applied to the IR fade-out

nodes.label: HiCut
nodes.description: Low-pass cutoff frequency applied to the IR

nodes.label: ProcessInput
nodes.description: When Off, bypasses convolution and outputs dry signal only. 60ms ramp on state change.

nodes.label: ProcessInput
nodes.description: Enables or disables convolution processing

nodes.label: Convolve
nodes.description: Two-stage partitioned FFT convolution: head (block-sized) for low latency, tail (up to 8192 samples) for the remainder

nodes.label: FFTType
nodes.description: Selects the FFT implementation (BestAvailable, IPP, AppleAccelerate, Ooura, FFTW3)

nodes.label: UseBackgroundThread
nodes.description: Moves tail convolution to a background thread to reduce audio thread load

nodes.label: Dry Gain
nodes.description: Smoothed gain applied to the original input signal

nodes.label: DryGain
nodes.description: Dry output level in dB (default -100 dB = silent)

nodes.label: Predelay
nodes.description: Per-sample delay line applied to the convolved signal before wet gain

nodes.label: Predelay
nodes.description: Delay time in milliseconds before the reverb tail

nodes.label: Wet Gain
nodes.description: Smoothed gain applied to the convolved signal

nodes.label: WetGain
nodes.description: Wet output level in dB (default 0 dB = unity)

nodes.label: 0.5x Compensation
nodes.description: Fixed 0.5x gain multiplier applied to the wet signal after the wet gain smoother

nodes.label: Sum
nodes.description: Adds the wet signal (with 0.5x compensation) to the dry signal

nodes.label: Audio Out (L/R)
nodes.description: Stereo audio output
